prestazioni: VK56VD 5.6L V8 engine: Forced induction upgrade using a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.32 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe and a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust system, supporting 650+ WHP on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing fuel, ignition, and boost control via flex-fuel sensor integration.

Drivetrain reinforcement: Upgraded Z1 Motorsports VK56VD-spec billet aluminum differential cover, Cusco 2-way LSD (250Nm torque capacity), and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel for the 7-speed automatic transmission, ensuring power delivery without slippage under extreme boost.

Suspension and handling: Full BC Racing BR coilover kit with Swift springs (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and custom valving for the QX56’s 5-link rear suspension, paired with SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and sway bar mounts) and a Whiteline 27mm adjustable rear sway bar to reduce body roll during aggressive cornering.
estetica: Widebody conversion: Rocket Bunny V3 aero kit (QX56-specific) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a 3-piece rear diffuser, widening the track by 3.5 inches for aggressive stance and tire clearance (22x12.5-inch front, 22x13.5-inch rear wheels).

Lightweight exterior: Seibon carbon fiber hood with integrated heat extractor vents (VK56VD-specific) and a custom 3D-printed ABS front splitter with integrated canards (designed in-house for the QX56’s bumper geometry) to improve aerodynamics at high speeds.

Interior and lighting: Full custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards with red contrast stitching, paired with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (QX56-specific mounting brackets) and a custom roll cage (1.75-inch DOM tubing, TIG-welded) for structural rigidity. Exterior lighting upgraded to LUX H8 V4 LED headlights with custom DRL halos and a Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog light kit for improved visibility.
